subtitle.en: from sourcing to onboarding · today vs. AI-augmented future
subtitle.pt: do sourcing ao onboarding · hoje vs. futuro com IA
subtitle.es: del sourcing al onboarding · hoy vs. futuro con IA

context.objective: Hiring manager defines the role, level, target start date, and gets sign-off on headcount.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Job requisition · Job description · Comp band

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: HM drafts → Recruiter reviews → Approver signs off on headcount

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Team growth need · Backfill · New project

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Sourcer starts outbound; recruiter posts publicly.

context.modulesSub: features that make this step work

states.label: Today
states.narrative: HM writes the JD from scratch in a doc, often copying from old roles. Recruiter rewrites for clarity. Comp band looked up manually in spreadsheet. Sign-off chain is email/Slack.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: AI drafts the JD from a 3-line brief + role template + recent successful hires. Comp band auto-populated from market data. Sign-off triggers programmatically with approval chain.
tools: JD generators in production at multiple ATSes

context.objective: Build a top-of-funnel pipeline of qualified candidates through outbound search, referrals, and inbound applications.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Candidate pool · Outreach campaign · ATS

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Sourcer drives outbound → Recruiter reviews inbound → HM gives 'thumbs up' on shortlist

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Open requisition exists. Target persona defined.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Qualified candidates move to phone screen.

context.modulesSub: features that make this step work

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Sourcer searches LinkedIn manually with boolean queries. Outreach templates pasted from a doc. Replies tracked in spreadsheet or basic ATS. Referrals come in via Slack.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: AI scores candidates against the JD + past hires, drafts personalized outreach per candidate, A/B tests subject lines, follows up automatically. Sourcer reviews + approves; doesn't write.
tools: AI sourcing tools shipping at scale (HireEZ, SeekOut)

context.objective: Candidate either responds to outreach or applies via job board.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Application · Resume · Cover letter (rare)

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Candidate submits → ATS captures → Recruiter notified

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Outreach received OR job posting discovered.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Recruiter screens the application.

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Standard ATS application form. Resume parsed automatically. Confirmation email sent.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: Candidate has a conversation with an AI agent that asks the right follow-up questions, captures structured info beyond the resume.

context.objective: Filter the candidate pool down to a manageable set worth phone-screening.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Resume · Screening rubric · Reject reasons

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Recruiter reads → applies rubric → HM spot-checks edge cases

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: New application received OR sourced candidate replied positively.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Pass → phone interview scheduled. Reject → rejection email sent.

context.modulesSub: features that make this step work

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Recruiter reads each resume (3-5 min each). Quick decision: pass/reject/maybe. 'Maybe' pile reviewed by HM weekly. Rejection emails sent manually or via template.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: AI scores resumes against the rubric + past successful hires, surfaces edge cases for human review, generates structured reject reasons. Recruiter reviews only borderline cases.
tools: Resume screening AI in many enterprise ATSes

context.objective: Find a time that works for candidate + interviewer.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Calendar invite · Availability poll

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Recruiter coordinates → Candidate confirms → Calendar invite sent

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Resume screen passed.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Phone screen happens.

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Back-and-forth email/Slack to find time. Sometimes Calendly link. Cancellations cause re-scheduling chains.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: Self-serve booking link with interviewer pool availability. Auto-rebook on cancellation. No human in the loop unless something breaks.

context.objective: Validate motivation, basic fit, salary expectations, and answer candidate's questions about the role.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Screen notes · Rubric scorecard · Salary expectations

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Recruiter leads → Candidate answers + asks → Notes captured

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Call scheduled. Candidate joined.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Pass → onsite loop scheduled. Reject → kind rejection.

context.modulesSub: features that make this step work

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Recruiter takes notes by hand or in ATS during the call. Scorecard filled in after. Salary expectations captured verbally.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: AI transcribes the call, extracts answers to standard questions, auto-fills the scorecard, flags inconsistencies or red flags. Recruiter reviews/edits — doesn't type.

context.objective: Candidate evaluates the company while being evaluated.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Call · First impression

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Candidate joins → answers questions → asks their own

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Calendar invite accepted.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Wait for next-step decision.

context.objective: Coordinate 5 interviewers + candidate for a single block (in-person or remote).

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Onsite agenda · Interviewer assignments · Room/Zoom

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Recruiter coordinates → Interviewers confirm → Candidate confirms

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Phone screen passed.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Onsite loop runs.

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Recruiter pings 5 interviewers individually to confirm. Builds the agenda in Google Calendar manually. Sends candidate prep doc.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: Interviewer pool with availability windows; system auto-builds the loop based on roles needed. Candidate prep doc auto-generated for the specific company + role.

context.objective: Gather structured signal across 4-5 dimensions: coding, design, behavioral, role-specific, culture.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Interview · Scorecard · Hire / no-hire vote

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Interviewer prepares → conducts → debriefs in scorecard

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Onsite scheduled and started.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Each interviewer submits a scorecard with a hire/no-hire vote and rationale.

context.modulesSub: features that make this step work

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Interviewer prepares from a question bank doc. Asks questions, takes notes by hand. After interview, types up scorecard (often days late). Vote: strong hire / hire / no-hire / strong no-hire.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: AI suggests questions based on candidate's resume + the role's signal needs. Transcribes the interview. Generates structured scorecard draft from the transcript. Interviewer reviews + commits within 1 hour, not 1 week.

context.objective: Candidate performs across 5 interviews over a day.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Performance · Energy · Fit

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Candidate cycles through each interviewer.

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Onsite started.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Wait for debrief decision.

context.objective: Panel reads all scorecards, discusses each interview, converges on a recommendation.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Debrief notes · Recommendation · Risk flags

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: HM facilitates → Interviewers present → Recruiter captures notes

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: All scorecards submitted (target: within 24h of last interview).

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Recommendation goes to approver.

context.modulesSub: features that make this step work

states.label: Today
states.narrative: 60-min meeting on calendar. HM reads scorecards aloud, each interviewer adds color. Discussion is conversational. Decision often delayed because scorecards are late.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: AI synthesizes scorecards into a 1-page debrief brief BEFORE the meeting (key signals, divergences, risk areas). Debrief becomes a 20-min discussion focused on the divergences, not on re-reading.
tools: Debrief summarization shipping in modern ATSes

context.objective: Final hiring authority reviews panel recommendation, checks comp + level calibration, makes the call.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Decision · Comp recommendation · Level

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Approver reviews packet → asks questions → decides

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Debrief recommendation submitted.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Approve → offer prepared. Reject → kind rejection.

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Approver reads scorecards + debrief notes. Often asks for additional reference checks or pings the HM for clarification. Comp decided in a separate conversation.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: AI packet includes: panel recommendation, calibration vs past hires at this level, market comp range, risk flags from interviews, suggested comp offer. Approver decides faster, with more context.
tools: Calibration tooling at Stripe, Meta, others

context.objective: Validate the panel's read on the candidate through 2-3 backchannel references.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Reference contact · Reference notes

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Recruiter contacts → references respond → notes attached to packet

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Approver requests OR strong-hire recommendation needs validation.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Notes go into the approval packet.

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Recruiter emails references, schedules 20-min calls, takes notes by hand. Slow — often takes 3-5 days.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: Async reference platform (references answer structured questions in writing). AI synthesizes responses. Same-day turnaround.

context.objective: Build the offer package: base, equity, signing bonus, benefits, start date.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Offer letter · Comp package · Equity grant

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Recruiter drafts → Approver signs off → Legal reviews → Offer letter generated

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Approval received.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Offer extended to candidate.

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Recruiter pulls comp from comp band sheet, equity from grant table, generates letter from template. Manual data entry. Legal reviews each one.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: Offer auto-generated from approved package. Legal templates pre-blessed for standard cases. DocuSign auto-sent.
tools: Offer letter automation in modern ATSes

context.objective: Recruiter (or HM) calls candidate, walks through the offer, answers questions, sells the role.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Offer call · Verbal acceptance OR negotiation

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Recruiter calls → Candidate responds → HM joins if needed

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Offer package ready.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Candidate decides. Negotiation may start.

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Recruiter schedules a 30-min call with the candidate. Walks through offer. Answers questions. Sometimes HM joins to sell the role.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: Stays human — the offer call is a relationship moment, not a transaction.
tools: No automation here is good automation.

context.objective: Candidate evaluates the offer against alternatives, makes a decision.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Decision · Counter-offer · Acceptance

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Candidate weighs → may negotiate → responds

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Offer extended.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Accept → onboarding kicks off. Decline → loss-reason captured. Negotiate → back to recruiter.

context.objective: From accepted offer to productive Day 1: equipment, accounts, paperwork, first-week schedule.

meta.label: Entity
meta.value: Onboarding checklist · Equipment order · Account provisioning · Day 1 schedule

meta.label: Actors
meta.value: Recruiter hands off to People Ops → IT provisions → HM plans Week 1

meta.label: Triggers
meta.value: Offer accepted.

meta.label: Next
meta.value: Day 1 happens.

states.label: Today
states.narrative: Onboarding checklist in a doc. Equipment ordered manually. Account creation requested in tickets. HM builds Week 1 schedule from a template.

states.label: Tomorrow
states.narrative: Acceptance triggers automated pipeline: equipment ordered, accounts provisioned, Slack channels added, buddy assigned, Week 1 calendar built. HM just shows up Day 1.
